name: Chicken Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces fat-free cheddar cheese (Healthy Choice), shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Spray a 13 x 9 inch (3 quart) baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat, then spray with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Stir-fry the chicken for 2 minutes until no longer pink. Add bell peppers, onion, and cilantro; stir-fry for 3-4 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in beans.
5. In a bowl, combine enchilada sauce and tomato sauce; blend well.
6. Spoon 2 tablespoons of the sauce into the bottom of the sprayed baking dish.
7. Place half of the chicken filling down the center of each tortilla; roll up seam side down.
8. Pour reserved sauce over the enchiladas in the baking dish, then cover.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 40 minutes until thoroughly heated. Sprinkle with cheese and let stand covered for 5 minutes to melt the cheese.
10. Serve with yogurt.
